title: Travelport、Cognizant 与 Anthropic 合作，为 AI 时代赋能旅行技术
fact: TEANECK, N.J. , May 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Cognizant (NASDAQ: CTSH ) is working with Travelport on a strategic AI transformation that will deploy Anthropic's Claude to modernize the way Travelport builds, tests and maintains software across its travel retailing and distribution platforms. The collaboration aims to accelerate the delivery of AI-led innovation to airlines, hoteliers, travel management companies and online travel agencies worldwide, while embedding AI features within Travelport's platform.
